preferences.readingTime: The quiet hour before bed, and Thursday afternoons off

book.title: The Lighthouse at Cedar Cove
book.author: Eleanor Frye
book.note: Quiet and well plotted. The harbor setting carried it.

book.title: A Garden in Wartime
book.author: Ruth Calloway
book.note: Stayed with me. The vegetable beds rang true.

book.title: Murder at the Maple Festival
book.author: Dot Pemberton
book.note: Light. A good week for it.

book.title: The Ferryman's Daughter
book.author: Margaret Hollis
book.note: Same author as the orchard book. Worth following.

book.title: The Quilters of Ashford Lane
book.author: Frances Begley
book.reason: Quilting circle plot. Pat recommended it on a Thursday call.

book.title: The Inn at Winter's End
book.author: Carol Day
book.reason: Set at a small inn. Could not resist.

book.title: Letters from the Green River
book.author: Helen Marsh
book.reason: New England setting near the Quebec border, close to home.
